mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_userinfo
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
birthday = #{birthday},
zipcode = #{zipcode},
addr1 = #{addr1},
addr2 = #{addr2},
WHERE loginID = #{loginID}
mapper.select: SELECT c.course_id AS courseId, c.title AS title, IFNULL(cc.class_name, '') AS className, DATE_FORMAT(c.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(c.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, TIME_FORMAT(ct.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, TIME_FORMAT(ct.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, COUNT(sc.loginID) AS studentCount FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_class cc ON c.class_id = cc.class_id LEFT JOIN course_time ct ON c.time_code = ct.time_code LEFT JOIN student_course sc ON c.course_id = sc.course_id WHERE c.professor = #{loginID} AND c.course_isDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.course_id, c.title, cc.class_name, c.start_date, c.end_date, ct.start_time, ct.end_time ORDER BY c.start_date DESC, c.course_id DESC
SELECT edu_level AS eduLevel, career FROM tb_userinfo WHERE loginID = #{loginID}

SELECT c.course_id AS courseId, c.title, CONCAT(DATE(c.start_date), ' ~ ', DATE(c.end_date)) AS period, CONCAT(ct.start_time, ' ~ ', ct.end_time) AS time, cc.class_name AS className, cc.people_limit AS peopleLimit, cs.name AS statusName, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_course sc WHERE sc.course_id = c.course_id ), 0) AS studentCount FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_class cc ON c.class_id = cc.class_id LEFT JOIN course_time ct ON c.time_code = ct.time_code LEFT JOIN course_status cs ON c.cos_sta_code = cs.cos_sta_code WHERE c.professor = #{loginId} AND c.course_isDeleted = false AND c.cos_sta_code = 1 ORDER BY c.start_date DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE professor = #{loginId} AND course_isDeleted = false AND cos_sta_code = 1
